name: Acorus calamus
mechanism_of_action: May act on GABAergic and serotonergic systems.
toxicity: High doses may be carcinogenic due to β-asarone.

name: Blue Lotus
mechanism_of_action: Likely acts as a phosphodiesterase inhibitor and serotonin modulator.
interactions: May enhance effects of alcohol and benzodiazepines
toxicity: Low; mild toxicity in high doses.
